summary: Completed testing of Iteration 23 features: SportMonks API integration for real-time live match fetching with Claude Opus win prediction. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with all required components rendering correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ health check returns scheduler status
Backend: POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live endpoint exists and responds
Backend: fetch-live returns SportMonks data with source='sportmonks'
Backend: fetch-live returns liveData with score, innings, battingTeam, bowlingTeam
Backend: fetch-live returns batsmen array with strikeRate mapped from strike_rate
Backend: fetch-live returns bowler object with name, overs, runs, wickets, economy
Backend: fetch-live returns yetToBat array with player names
Backend: fetch-live returns yetToBowl array with player names
Backend: fetch-live returns fullBattingCard array
Backend: fetch-live returns fullBowlingCard array
Backend: claudePrediction has predicted_winner, win_pct, headline, reasoning
Backend: claudePrediction has batting_depth_assessment, bowling_assessment, confidence, momentum
Backend: probabilities has ensemble, bayesian, poisson, dls, momentum values
Backend: GET /api/cricket-api/fetch-live CricketData.org fallback endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/cricket-api/usage returns API usage stats
Backend: GET /api/cricket-api/cached returns cached live data
Backend: GET /api/matches/{matchId}/state returns cached match state
Backend: GET /api/schedule returns matches list
Frontend: LiveMatch page renders with data-testid='live-match-page'
Frontend: Fetch Live Scores button triggers POST /api/matches/{matchId}/fetch-live
Frontend: Live scoreboard shows score, CRR, RRR correctly
Frontend: Source: SPORTMONKS badge displayed in header
Frontend: At The Crease section shows current batsmen with strikeRate
Frontend: Yet to Bat section shows remaining batting lineup
Frontend: Yet to Bowl section shows remaining bowling options
Frontend: Claude Opus Live Prediction panel shows winner, win_pct, headline, reasoning
Frontend: Claude prediction shows batting_depth_assessment and bowling_assessment
Frontend: Live Match Prediction panel shows win probability, phase, wickets in hand
Frontend: Chase Analysis shows runs needed, balls remaining, RRR, difficulty
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly implements SportMonks API as primary source with CricketData.org fallback
sportmonks_service.py parse_fixture correctly extracts batting, bowling, lineup data
ai_service.py claude_sportmonks_prediction passes full batting/bowling cards to Claude for depth assessment
LiveMatch.js correctly renders yetToBat, yetToBowl, claudePrediction panels
LiveScoreboard.js correctly calculates RRR from target when innings=2
Batsmen strikeRate correctly mapped from SportMonks strike_rate in fetch-live endpoint
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing match ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT) with live SportMonks data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 features fully working: (1) SportMonks API is primary source for live data with rich batting/bowling cards. (2) Claude Opus generates live win prediction with batting_depth_assessment and bowling_assessment. (3) yetToBat and yetToBowl arrays passed to Claude for depth analysis. (4) CricketData.org fallback works when SportMonks has no data. Match ipl2026_009 (RR vs GT) is currently live and can be used for testing.

sportmonks_integration.verification: Response includes source='sportmonks', liveData, batsmen, bowler, yetToBat, yetToBowl

claude_prediction.description: Claude Opus generates live win prediction with full context
claude_prediction.verification: claudePrediction has predicted_winner, win_pct, headline, reasoning, batting_depth_assessment, bowling_assessment

batsmen_strike_rate.description: Batsmen strikeRate mapped from SportMonks strike_rate
batsmen_strike_rate.verification: batsmen array has strikeRate field populated

yet_to_bat_bowl.description: yetToBat and yetToBowl arrays populated from lineup
yet_to_bat_bowl.verification: Arrays contain player names for remaining batting/bowling options

full_batting_bowling_card.verification: Arrays contain detailed batting/bowling stats for current innings

cricketdata_fallback.description: CricketData.org fallback when SportMonks has no data

frontend_live_scoreboard.description: Live scoreboard shows score, CRR, RRR correctly
frontend_live_scoreboard.verification: RRR calculated from target when innings=2

frontend_claude_panel.description: Claude Opus Live Prediction panel renders all fields
frontend_claude_panel.verification: Shows winner, win_pct, headline, reasoning, batting_depth, bowling_assessment

frontend_yet_to_bat_bowl.description: Yet to Bat and Yet to Bowl sections render
frontend_yet_to_bat_bowl.verification: Player names displayed in both sections
